title: YmpgVehicle
description: Aggregated summary of community-contributed real-world MPG data for a single vehicle.

avgMpg.description: Average MPG across all community submissions

maxMpg.description: Highest MPG recorded in community submissions

minMpg.description: Lowest MPG recorded in community submissions

recordCount.description: Total number of community MPG submissions for this vehicle

cityPercent.description: Aggregate percentage of city driving across all submissions

highwayPercent.description: Aggregate percentage of highway driving across all submissions
